title: Homepage redesign — reverse-chronological feed, founding edition archived
summary: The homepage has been redesigned from scratch. The founding-edition content (formerly the entire index.html) has been moved to /briefings/001.html. The new index.html opens with a hero card for Briefing 015 ('The protocol layer'), followed by a reverse-chronological feed (014 → 013 → 012 → 011), an updated news ticker covering T+0d through T+~13d real, the two-clocks stakeholder banner, and a founding-edition link panel. All briefings archive references to ../index.html have been updated to 001.html. Masthead nav now shows 'Latest · 015 →'. Folio updated to 'Vol. I · Issues 001–015'. O-1 status: skip link, main landmark, focus-visible ring, link underlines, aria-labels, prefers-reduced-motion blocks, 44px minimum touch targets on CTAs all present. ticker-source border-bottom zeroed to avoid double-underline on anchor. No new a11y findings opened; no existing findings closed (O-1 audit track continues).
deprecations: index.html no longer serves as Briefing No. 001 — moved to briefings/001.html
Title 'Founding Edition' subhead removed from homepage masthead
o1_status: No new findings. Preserved: skip link, main landmark, dateline class for app.js live stamp, echo.js listen widget, prefers-reduced-motion blocks. Added: aria-label on ticker, rn-banner, founding-link, feed heading, hero aside. CTA min-height 44px. Link colors use --ochre-link (7.14:1 AAA). ticker-source border-bottom:0 prevents double-underline artifact on nav anchor.
